name: NSS 81st Round (Modular Survey)
description: Comprehensive annual modular survey with 10 indicators on household consumption and digital access.

indicators.name: Household Monthly Per Capita Consumption Expenditure (MPCE)
indicators.description: Average monthly per capita consumption expenditure for rural and urban households.

indicators.name: Food Consumption Expenditure
indicators.description: Share of food expenditure in total household consumption expenditure.

indicators.name: Non-Food Consumption Expenditure
indicators.description: Share of non-food expenditure in total household consumption expenditure.

indicators.name: Access to Improved Drinking Water
indicators.description: Percentage of households with access to improved drinking water sources.

indicators.name: Access to Improved Sanitation
indicators.description: Percentage of households with access to improved sanitation facilities.

indicators.name: Household Electrification
indicators.description: Percentage of households with access to electricity.

indicators.name: Internet Access in Households
indicators.description: Percentage of households with internet access.

indicators.name: Mobile Phone Ownership
indicators.description: Percentage of households owning at least one mobile phone.

indicators.name: Digital Payment Usage
indicators.description: Percentage of households using digital payment methods.

indicators.name: Poverty Headcount Ratio
indicators.description: Percentage of population below the poverty line based on consumption expenditure.
